    likely we'll need to fix that.

    STYLING
    termly is applying in line styles to many elements
    we can set some of these from Termly
    however if we need more customization we can try target directly with css

    /* initial cookie banner popup - make body text red */
    [class^="termly-styles-main"] {
      color: red;
    }

    /* preferences popup - make button red */
    [class^="termly-styles-root"] > button {
      background: red !important;
    }

  /**
   * don't block trustpilot widget from loading if consent is declined
   * the widget doesn't track, it just needs to load their JS to show review stars
   * must be added to global blocking map, since trustpilot dynamically loads an iframe which will be autoblocked otherwise
   *
   * https://support.termly.io/en/articles/7904650-implementing-a-custom-blocking-map-to-change-auto-blocker-s-blocking-behavior
   */

    'bing.com': 'essential', // GTM requirement for Microsoft Advertising. Have been assured that GTM will apply appropriate Consent checks.
    'trustpilot.com': 'essential',
    /**
     * allow youtube embeds to load without consent
     */
    'youtube.com': 'essential',
    'youtube-nocookie.com': 'essential',
    'sheerid.com': 'essential',

  function handleNavigation(direction) {
    const container = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!container) return;

    // Check if currently scrolling
    if (container.dataset.isScrolling === 'true') return;

    // Check bounds before scrolling
    const isAtStart = Math.abs(container.scrollLeft) < 1;
    const isAtEnd =
      Math.abs(
        container.scrollLeft + container.clientWidth - container.scrollWidth,
      ) < 1;

    if (
      (direction === 'left' && isAtStart) ||
      (direction === 'right' && isAtEnd)
    ) {
      return;
    }

    const scrollAmount =
      direction === 'left' ? -container.clientWidth : container.clientWidth;

    // Set scrolling flag
    container.dataset.isScrolling = 'true';

    container.scrollTo({
      left: container.scrollLeft + scrollAmount,
      behavior: 'smooth',
    });

    // Clear scrolling flag after animation completes
    setTimeout(() => {
      container.dataset.isScrolling = 'false';
      updateButtonStates();
    }, 500); // Typical smooth scroll duration
  }

  function updateButtonStates() {
    const container = document.getElementById(id);
    const leftBtn = document.getElementById(`${id}-nav-left-btn`);
    const rightBtn = document.getElementById(`${id}-nav-right-btn`);

    if (!container || !leftBtn || !rightBtn) return;

    const isAtStart = Math.abs(container.scrollLeft) < 1;
    const isAtEnd =
      Math.abs(
        container.scrollLeft + container.clientWidth - container.scrollWidth,
      ) < 1;

    leftBtn.disabled = isAtStart;
    rightBtn.disabled = isAtEnd;

    // Update aria-disabled for better accessibility
    leftBtn.setAttribute('aria-disabled', isAtStart.toString());
    rightBtn.setAttribute('aria-disabled', isAtEnd.toString());
  }

  function initializeCarousel() {
    const container = document.getElementById(id);
    const leftBtn = document.getElementById(`${id}-nav-left-btn`);
    const rightBtn = document.getElementById(`${id}-nav-right-btn`);

    if (container && leftBtn && rightBtn) {
      // Initialize scrolling flag
      container.dataset.isScrolling = 'false';

      // Use throttled scroll event listener
      let scrollTimeout;
      container.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
        if (scrollTimeout) clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);
        scrollTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
          updateButtonStates();
        }, 150);
      });

      leftBtn.addEventListener('click', () => handleNavigation('left'));
      rightBtn.addEventListener('click', () => handleNavigation('right'));

      // Initial state update
      setTimeout(updateButtonStates, 100);
    }
  }

  // Initialize on both DOMContentLoaded and load
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initializeCarousel);
  } else {
    initializeCarousel();
  }

  // Backup initialization and handle resize
  window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    setTimeout(updateButtonStates, 100);
  });

  // Handle window resize
  window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
    const container = document.getElementById(id);
    if (container) {
      container.dataset.isScrolling = 'false';
      updateButtonStates();
    }
  });
})();</script> <div class="bg-ivory"> <section class="py-[46px] md:py-[74px] mx-auto max-w-7xl px-6 md:px-10"> <div class="flex items-center justify-between"> <h3 class="text-ebony text-title-small md:text-headline-small font-light"> Explore our instruments </h3> <div class="flex gap-2"> <button id="00ea0d54-08e8-4e1b-8339-e909144e0748-nav-left-btn" class="nav-left p-2 bg-ivory-mid text-ebony disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed -scale-x-100 w-[33px] h-[33px] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center" aria-label="Scroll left"><svg width="6" height="10" viewBox="0 0 6 10" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

  function handleNavigation(direction) {
    const container = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!container) return;

    if (container.dataset.isScrolling === 'true') return;

    // Check bounds before scrolling
    const isAtStart = Math.abs(container.scrollLeft) < 1;
    const isAtEnd =
      Math.abs(
        container.scrollLeft + container.clientWidth - container.scrollWidth,
      ) < 1;

    if (
      (direction === 'left' && isAtStart) ||
      (direction === 'right' && isAtEnd)
    ) {
      return;
    }

    const scrollAmount =
      direction === 'left' ? -container.clientWidth : container.clientWidth;

    // Set scrolling flag
    container.dataset.isScrolling = 'true';

    container.scrollTo({
      left: container.scrollLeft + scrollAmount,
      behavior: 'smooth',
    });

    // Clear scrolling flag after animation completes
    setTimeout(() => {
      container.dataset.isScrolling = 'false';
      updateButtonStates();
    }, 500); // Typical smooth scroll duration
  }

  function updateButtonStates() {
    const container = document.getElementById(id);
    const leftBtn = document.getElementById(`${id}-nav-left-btn`);
    const rightBtn = document.getElementById(`${id}-nav-right-btn`);

    if (!container || !leftBtn || !rightBtn) return;

    const isAtStart = Math.abs(container.scrollLeft) < 1;
    const isAtEnd =
      Math.abs(
        container.scrollLeft + container.clientWidth - container.scrollWidth,
      ) < 1;

    leftBtn.disabled = isAtStart;
    rightBtn.disabled = isAtEnd;

    // Update aria-disabled for better accessibility
    leftBtn.setAttribute('aria-disabled', isAtStart.toString());
    rightBtn.setAttribute('aria-disabled', isAtEnd.toString());
  }

  function initializeCarousel() {
    const container = document.getElementById(id);
    const leftBtn = document.getElementById(`${id}-nav-left-btn`);
    const rightBtn = document.getElementById(`${id}-nav-right-btn`);

    if (container && leftBtn && rightBtn) {
      container.dataset.isScrolling = 'false';

      let scrollTimeout;
      container.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
        if (scrollTimeout) clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);
        scrollTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
          updateButtonStates();
        }, 150);
      });

      leftBtn.addEventListener('click', () => handleNavigation('left'));
      rightBtn.addEventListener('click', () => handleNavigation('right'));

      setTimeout(updateButtonStates, 100);
    }
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initializeCarousel);
  } else {
    initializeCarousel();
  }

  window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    setTimeout(updateButtonStates, 100);
  });

  window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
    const container = document.getElementById(id);
    if (container) {
      container.dataset.isScrolling = 'false';
      updateButtonStates();
    }
  });
})();</script> <div class="bg-on-ivory-dark-ivory"> <section class="py-[46px] md:py-[74px] mx-auto max-w-7xl px-6 md:px-10"> <div class="flex items-center justify-between"> <h3 class="text-in-ivory-ebony text-title-small md:text-headline-small font-light"> Stories from the blog </h3> <div class="flex gap-2"> <button id="332e9d78-f1a5-47de-b49f-c9ab2600b9b8-nav-left-btn" class="nav-left p-2  bg-ivory text-in-ivory-ebony  disabled:opacity-50 -scale-x-100 w-[33px] h-[33px] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center" aria-label="Previous Article"><svg width="6" height="10" viewBox="0 0 6 10" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

  function accordionSetup() {
    const accordionMenus = document.querySelectorAll('.footer_accordion');
    accordionMenus.forEach((accordionMenu) => {
      const accordionButton = accordionMenu.querySelector(
        '.footer_accordion__button'
      );
      const accordionContent = accordionMenu.querySelector(
        '.footer_accordion__content'
      );
      const plusIcon = accordionButton.querySelector('#plus-icon');
      const minusIcon = accordionButton.querySelector('#minus-icon');

      if (accordionButton && accordionContent) {
        accordionButton.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
          // Open a closed menu or close an open menu
          if (!accordionMenu.classList.contains('active')) {
            accordionMenu.classList.add('active');
            accordionContent.classList.remove('hidden');
            accordionContent.style.maxHeight =
              accordionContent.scrollHeight + 'px';
            plusIcon.classList.add('hidden');
            minusIcon.classList.remove('hidden');
          } else {
            accordionMenu.classList.remove('active');
            accordionContent.style.maxHeight = '0px';
            plusIcon.classList.remove('hidden');
            minusIcon.classList.add('hidden');
            // Delay to allow close animation
            setTimeout(() => {
              accordionContent.classList.add('hidden');
            }, 300);
          }
          event.preventDefault();
          return false;
        });
      }
    });
  }
  // Runs on initial page load
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', accordionSetup);
</script> <astro-island uid="X29td" component-url="/_astro/track-ga4-event.DVH4_npU.js" component-export="TrackGa4Event" renderer-url="/_astro/client.D0jrzOra.js" props="{"eventName":[0,"go_to_support"],"clickTriggerElementId":[0,"mobile-footer-link-support"]}" ssr client="only" opts="{"name":"TrackGa4Event","value":"solid-js"}"></astro-island> <div class="flex flex-col pb-8 xl:hidden">  <div class="footer_accordion border-on-ebony-dark-ivory border-t border-b-0 text-ebony"> <button class="footer_accordion__button text-ebony text-body-medium flex w-full items-center justify-between py-3 font-semibold" type="button"> Company <div class="ml-3"> <div id="plus-icon" class="size-[16px] stroke-[0.1]"><svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 16 16" stroke="inherit" stroke-width="inherit" fill="inherit" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
